notableEvents.label: Pitcher Seth Lugo picked off

notableEvents.label: Allowed 114.2 mph to Bobby Witt Jr.

notableEvents.detail: Top 9 · 0–1 · Umpire reviewed (tag play), call on the field was upheld: pitcher Lucas Erceg picks off Gunnar Henderson at 1st on throw to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino.
